full_prompt: Design a single quadrotor motor arm intended for a UAE Drone Innovation Challenge entry operated in typical Gulf region ambient conditions. The parent vehicle is a quadrotor with MTOW 8 kg, hovering max per-motor thrust 25 N and peak (1.5 g pull-up limit) 37.5 N per motor. The arm is a hollow tubular cantilever of length 300 mm from chassis clamp to motor boss, outer diameter 24 mm, wall 2 mm, made of T700 woven CFRP (E 60 GPa, tensile 550 MPa, compressive 450 MPa, density 1520 kg/m^3, glass transition Tg 120 C for the epoxy matrix). The competition environment subjects the arm to a combined mechanical + thermal case: ambient air 50 C at sea level, direct solar irradiance 1100 W/m^2 on the upper surface, motor conducting heat into the motor-boss clamp at 90 C steady state when in hover. Load cases: (LC1) hover thrust 25 N per arm upward with 8 kg vehicle at 1 g gravity (quasi-static); (LC2) limit pull-up 1.5 g: thrust 37.5 N per arm; (LC3) ultimate = 1.5 x LC2 = 56.25 N per arm, per STANAG 4703 composite FoS 1.5 on limit; (LC4) combined thermal-mechanical: steady-state thermal field with 50 C ambient, 1100 W/m^2 solar on upper tube half, 90 C motor boss. Solve thermal steady state first; then run the mechanical LC3 load on top of the thermal strains computed from that temperature field (reference temperature 25 C); (LC5) bird-strike-equivalent lateral impact 200 N at the motor boss. Pass/fail criteria: (R1) under LC3 ultimate mechanical, maximum stress must remain below 275 MPa (550 / 2.0 composite FoS); (R2) under LC4 combined thermal-mechanical, maximum stress must remain below 275 MPa AND maximum arm temperature must remain below 100 C (20 C below matrix Tg) to preserve composite stiffness (R2 is a coupled multi-physics gate); (R3) tip deflection under LC1 must remain below 3 mm to preserve flight-controller IMU alignment; (R4) first arm bending natural frequency must exceed 40 Hz; (R5) arm dry mass must not exceed 85 g. Thermal analysis is a primary verification gate here (unlike most structural UAV problems) because Gulf-climate operating envelope is tight. Fluid and radiation (ionizing) analyses not required; solar irradiance is modeled as a surface heat flux boundary condition. Deliverables: STEP AP242 solid model, composite layup schedule, steady-state thermal FEA result with temperature field, mechanical FEA per load case, combined thermal-mechanical report for LC4, modal report, mass check.
short_prompt:
Design a single quadrotor motor arm for a UAE Drone Innovation Challenge entry operated in Gulf ambient. MTOW 8 kg, max per-motor thrust 25 N hover, 37.5 N at 1.5 g limit pull-up, ultimate 1.5 x limit per STANAG 4703. Environment: 50 C ambient, 1100 W/m^2 solar on the upper arm surface, 90 C steady motor-boss heat-in; thermal-mechanical is a primary gate here.

Envelope: hollow cantilever T700 woven CFRP tube, 300 mm long x 24 mm OD x 2 mm wall, matrix Tg 120 C.

Factor regime: composite FoS 2.0 (allowable 275 MPa) on ultimate; max arm temperature <= 100 C (20 C margin to Tg); tip deflection at hover < 3 mm; first cantilever mode > 40 Hz; dry mass < 85 g.

Load cases.
- Hover: 25 N up per arm with 8 kg at 1 g.
- Limit pull-up 1.5 g: 37.5 N per arm.
- Ultimate 1.5 x limit: 56.25 N per arm.
- Combined thermal-mechanical: steady thermal field (50 C ambient / 1100 W/m^2 solar / 90 C boss) with reference 25 C, superposed on ultimate mechanical.
- Bird-strike-equivalent lateral 200 N at the motor boss.

prompt.title: UAE Drone Challenge Hot-Climate Quadrotor Arm
prompt.brief: T700 CFRP tube arm, 300 mm cantilever, 50 C ambient + 1100 W/m^2 solar + 90 C motor boss thermal load combined with 1.5 g ultimate mechanical.

load_cases.name: thermal_mechanical_combined
load_cases.application: steady thermal + LC3 mechanical on pre-strained structure

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: layered shell for tube; solid TET10 for bosses

notes.needs_rulebook_fetch_reason: MBRSC UAE Drone Olympiad / Drone Innovation Challenge has no public design-requirement PDF (per catalog Tier C note). Numeric values assume hot-climate gates inferred from regional practice; confirm MTOW class, exact ambient temperature case, and FoS on rulebook fetch.

exclusions_explained.fluid_analysis: Solar input modeled as surface heat flux.
exclusions_explained.radiation_analysis: Ionizing radiation not relevant at sea level ops.
